title: Sharing Gantt View with others
excerpt: We would love to save the Gantt view in Dashboards. We can export Gantt view information to excel however we’d love to save the Monday version as a PDF so we can share with key clients. Currently, when we try to save the…

posts.author: marcusgallo (Marcus Gallo)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love to save the Gantt view in Dashboards. We can export Gantt view information to excel however we’d love to save the Monday version as a PDF so we can share with key clients. Currently, when we try to save the Monday version as a PDF it saves as a screenshot rather than the whole Gantt chart
